memories.content:
## OpenRouter billing API doesn't require OAuth — uses direct Bearer auth

Research finding: OpenRouter's billing endpoints (`/api/v1/auth/key` and `/api/v1/credits`) use **direct Bearer token authentication**, not OAuth flow. This differs from GitHub Copilot which requires OAuth.

Authentication format: `Authorization: Bearer <OPENROUTER_API_KEY>`

This simplifies integration — the management API key can be used directly without implementing an OAuth flow. The 401 responses from unauthenticated requests confirm the endpoints exist and expect Bearer token auth.
